sfDefinitions.description: The Begin Active Environment Group structured field begins an Active Environment Group, which establishes the environment parameters for the page or overlay. The scope of the active environment group is the containing page or overlay.

layout.name: SVSize
layout.description: Specified Vertical Font Size, in 20ths of a point

layout.name: SHScale
layout.description: Specified Horizontal Scale Factor, in 20ths of a point

layout.name: Section
layout.description: Section Number: X'00' single-byte, X'41'-X'FE' double-byte raster, X'FF' reserved

layout.name: DefCharID
layout.description: Default Graphic Character Global ID (payload offset 0-7)

layout.name: CPIRGLen
layout.description: CPI Repeating Group Length: X'0A' single-byte code page, X'0B' double-byte code page, X'FE' single-byte including Unicode scalar values, X'FF' double-byte including Unicode scalar values

layout.name: UnicodeScalarValue
layout.description: Optional 4-byte Unicode scalar value present only when `CPIRGLen` (byte 9) is X'FE' or X'FF'. When present it immediately follows the fixed 13-byte header and is returned as UBIN (4 bytes).
layout.notes: Only present when byte 9 is X'FE' or X'FF'. If present, this field contains a Unicode scalar mapped to the default character ID.

layout.name: NumCdPts
layout.description: Number of Coded Graphic Characters Assigned (payload offset 34-37)

layout.name: GCSGID
layout.description: Graphic Character Set GID (payload offset 38-39). Values: X'0000' (no GCSGID assigned), X'0001'-X'FFFE' (GCSGID), X'FFFF' (no GCSGID assigned)

layout.name: CPGID
layout.description: Code Page Global Identifier (payload offset 40-41). Values: X'0000' (no CPGID assigned), X'0001'-X'FFFE' (CPGID), X'FFFF' (no CPGID assigned)

layout.name: EncScheme
layout.description: Encoding Scheme (payload offset 42-43). Optional field describing encoding scheme.

definition.notes: Repeating group length is provided by CPIRGLen (byte 9) in the CPC structured field; parser should loop using that length. Each group entry layout: GCGID (0-7 CHAR), PrtFlags (8 BITS), CodePoint (9 — 1 or 2 bytes UBIN depending on CPIRGLen). When CPIRGLen indicates Unicode scalar mappings (X'FE' or X'FF'), one or more 4-byte Unicode scalar values follow the fixed header as indicated by the group's count parameter.

layout.name: CodePoint
layout.description: Code point for the character. Length is determined by CPIRGLen (found in CPC byte 9): single-byte (1) or double-byte (2).
layout.notes: Variable length: when CPIRGLen indicates single-byte code page use 1 byte, when double-byte use 2 bytes. Parser should consult CPIRGLen in CPC to determine length per group entry.

layout.name: UnicodeMapping
layout.description: Optional Unicode scalar mappings for the group entry. When present, the mapping consists of a 1-byte count followed by that many 4-byte UBIN Unicode scalar values.
layout.notes: Present only when CPIRGLen is X'FE' or X'FF' (per CPC). Parser should read the count and then read that many 4-byte Unicode scalars. This field follows the fixed-length portion of the group entry (after CodePoint).

definition.notes: Repeating group length is provided by FNORGLen in the FNC structured field (offset 14 of FNC). Parser/UI should loop using that length (26 bytes expected). Reserved elements at offsets 0 and 16 are not displayed in the repeating-group table.

layout.name: Reserved0
layout.description: Reserved for future use (do not display)
layout.notes: Reserved; not shown in the repeating-group table

layout.name: OrntFlags
layout.description: Orientation and flag bits (Font Index selection, kerning, uniform A-space, uniform baseline offset, uniform char increment)
layout.notes: Bits 0-2: Font Index selection; Bit3: reserved; Bit4: Kerning; Bit5: Uniform A-space; Bit6: Uniform Baseline Offset; Bit7: Uniform Character Increment

layout.name: Reserved16
layout.description: Reserved for future use (do not display)
layout.notes: Reserved; not shown in the repeating-group table

layout.name: FntFlags
layout.notes: Bit0: 0=Normal printing, 1=MICR printing; Bit1: 0=Complete font, 1=Extension font; Bits2-3: reserved; Bit4: retired baseline shift indicator; Bit5: reserved; Bit6: 0=Variable raster pattern size, 1=Uniform raster pattern size; Bit7: reserved

enumMap.03E8: 1000 units per em (relative base for PatTech 0x1E/0x1F)
1000 units per em (relative base for PatTech 0x1E/0x1F)

enumMap.1A: Constant length for FNO repeating group

enumMap.1C: Raster technology font or outline technology font (common length)

enumMap.16: Constant length for FNP repeating group

enumMap.00: Outline font data present in FNGs
enumMap.08: Raster pattern data present in FNGs

layout.name: MaxPtSize
layout.description: Maximum Vertical Size, in 10ths of a Point (payload offset 34-35)

layout.name: NomPtSize
layout.description: Nominal Vertical Size, in 10ths of a Point (payload offset 36-37)

layout.name: MinPtSize
layout.description: Minimum Vertical Size, in 10ths of a Point (payload offset 38-39)

layout.name: MaxHSize
layout.description: Maximum Horizontal Size, in 20ths of a point (payload offset 40-41)

layout.name: NomHSize
layout.description: Nominal Horizontal Size, in 20ths of a point (payload offset 42-43)

layout.name: MinHSize
layout.description: Minimum Horizontal Size, in 20ths of a point (payload offset 44-45)

layout.name: PatData
layout.description: Up to 32,759 bytes of pattern data

definition.notes: Repeating group length is provided by FNIRGLen in FNC; parser should loop using that length.
Repeating group length supplied by FNMRGLen (byte 21) in FNC; parser should loop using that length.

layout.name: FNNMapSection
layout.description: Repeating group: each entry contains an 8-byte GCGID and a 4-byte technology-specific ID offset.

layout.name: TSIDList
layout.description: Variable-length Technology-Specific Identifiers. Each member begins with a length byte that includes the length byte.

definition.notes: Repeating group length is provided by FNPRGLen in the FNC structured field (offset 20 of FNC). Parser/UI should loop using that length (22 bytes expected). Reserved elements at offsets 0,10-14,16 are not displayed in the repeating-group table.

layout.name: Reserved0
layout.description: Reserved for future use (do not display)
layout.notes: Reserved; not shown in the repeating-group table

layout.name: Reserved10_14
layout.description: Reserved for future use (do not display)
layout.notes: Reserved; not shown in the repeating-group table

layout.name: Reserved16
layout.description: Reserved for future use (do not display)
layout.notes: Reserved; not shown in the repeating-group table

definition.notes: Repeating group contains page position data for each page on the sheet. Each group entry includes XmOset, YmOset, PGorient, SHside, PgFlgs, and PMCid.

sfDefinitions.description: Page Position (PGP) structured field. Specifies the position and orientation of each page on a sheet, including sheet side, partition, and modification controls.

layout.name: RepeatingGroup
layout.description: One or more repeating groups, each describing a page position on the sheet.

groupLayout.name: XmOset
groupLayout.description: X coordinate of page presentation space origin (-32,768 to 32,767)

groupLayout.name: YmOset
groupLayout.description: Y coordinate of page presentation space origin (-32,768 to 32,767)

groupLayout.name: PGorient
groupLayout.description: Page presentation space X-axis rotation from medium presentation space (0°, 90°, 180°, 270°)

groupLayout.name: PgFlgs
groupLayout.description: Additional presentation controls for the partition (bit flags)
groupLayout.notes: See PGP Semantics for PgFlgs bit definitions.

groupLayout.name: PMCid
groupLayout.description: Page Modification Control identifier (0–127, X'FF' = apply all modifications)

layout.description: self-identifying parameter that contains three components: the length of the triplet, an ID identifying the triplet, and the associated parameters.

layout.description: self-identifying parameter that contains three components: the length of the triplet, an ID identifying the triplet, and the associated parameters.

definition.name: Presentation Text (PTX)
definition.notes: PTX payload contains PTOCA control sequences starting at payload offset 2. See AMB (0xD3), AMI (0xC7), TRN (0xDB).

sfDefinitions.description: PTX — Presentation Text structured field. Layout is PTOCA (control sequences).

layout.name: PTOCA stream
layout.description: Presentation Text Object Content Architecture control sequences starting at payload offset 2. Variable length; contains control sequence blocks encoded as [length][code][data].

layout.name: Triplets
layout.description: self-identifying parameter that contains three components: the length of the triplet, an ID identifying the triplet, and the associated parameters.

sfDefinitions.description: Medium descriptor specifying medium base, units, size and control flags.

layout.name: XmBase
layout.description: Medium unit base for the X axis. X'00' = 10 inches; X'01' = 10 centimeters.

layout.name: YmBase
layout.description: Medium unit base for the Y axis. X'00' = 10 inches; X'01' = 10 centimeters.

layout.name: XmUnits
layout.description: Medium units per unit base for the X axis (1..32767).

layout.name: YmUnits
layout.description: Medium units per unit base for the Y axis (1..32767).

layout.name: XmSize
layout.description: Medium extent for the X axis. X'000000' = extent not specified; X'FFFFFF' = presentation process default.

layout.name: YmSize
layout.description: Medium extent for the Y axis. X'000000' = extent not specified; X'FFFFFF' = presentation process default.

layout.name: MDDFlags
layout.description: Specify control information for the media. See MDD semantics for bit definitions.

layout.name: Triplets
layout.description: self-identifying parameter that contains three components: the length of the triplet, an ID identifying the triplet, and the associated parameters.
